name: Shantae
description: Action-platform and exploration series starring Shantae, a half-genie hero who uses hair-whip attacks, dances, transformations, and magic.

eras.title: Handheld Origin Era
eras.description: The series begins as a late Game Boy Color cult release and returns through Risky's Revenge.

eras.title: Modern Indie Era
eras.description: Pirate's Curse, Half-Genie Hero, Seven Sirens, and Risky Revolution establish Shantae as WayForward's flagship series.
